Bristol Street Jam 2025

Bristol Street Jam 2025

photosgigsbmx

Bristol Street Jam 2025

On a hot, sweaty day in August, it was decided that we should pedal around Bristol (involving several hills) and enjoy those that were keen throwing themselves at various obstacles.

Much fun was had, skin was lost, and then some bands (all of em with Tom Sturmey on bass, natch) played us some of their finest lullabies. Pics in roughly chronological order.

The fine folks at Dig (courtesy of Fred Murray) filmed the entire extravaganza.
